case_title: KIRK P SMITH VS. JULIO BOLIVAR-DILLION

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, KIRK P IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOLIVAR-DILLION, JULIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, KIRK P AS TO DEFENDANT BOLIVAR-DILLION, JULIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF KIRK P SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIO BOLIVAR-DILLION IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AND READY TO PROCEED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, KIRK P AS TO DEFENDANT BOLIVAR-DILLION, JULIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-30-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KIRK P. SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIO BOLIVAR-DILLION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
